post_state_files.client.py:
from typing import Any, Dict, Optional

import httpx


class APIError(Exception):
    """Raised when the remote API returns a 4xx or 5xx status."""
    def __init__(self, status_code: int, body: Optional[str] = None):
        super().__init__(f'API error {status_code}: {body}')
        self.status_code = status_code
        self.body = body


class APIClient:
    """Async API client. Wraps httpx.AsyncClient."""

    def __init__(self, base_url: str, timeout: float = 5.0):
        self.base_url = base_url.rstrip('/')
        self.timeout = timeout

    async def fetch_user(self, user_id: int) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """GET /users/{user_id} → JSON dict. Raises APIError on 4xx/5xx,
        re-raises httpx.TransportError on network failure."""
        async with httpx.AsyncClient(timeout=self.timeout) as client:
            r = await client.get(f'{self.base_url}/users/{user_id}')
            if r.status_code >= 400:
                raise APIError(r.status_code, r.text)
            return r.json()

    async def create_post(self, author_id: int, title: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """POST /posts. Body must be {author_id, title}. Returns the created post."""
        async with httpx.AsyncClient(timeout=self.timeout) as client:
            r = await client.post(
                f'{self.base_url}/posts',
                json={'author_id': author_id, 'title': title},
            )
            if r.status_code >= 400:
                raise APIError(r.status_code, r.text)
            return r.json()

    async def ping(self) -> bool:
        """GET /healthz → True iff response is 200."""
        async with httpx.AsyncClient(timeout=self.timeout) as client:
            try:
                r = await client.get(f'{self.base_url}/healthz')
                return r.status_code == 200
            except httpx.TransportError:
                return False
post_state_files.test_client.py:
import httpx
import pytest

from client import APIClient, APIError


@pytest.fixture
def client():
    return APIClient("https://api.example.com")


@pytest.mark.asyncio
async def test_fetch_user_returns_json(httpx_mock, client):
    httpx_mock.add_response(
        url="https://api.example.com/users/42",
        method="GET",
        json={"id": 42, "name": "Alice"},
        status_code=200,
    )
    result = await client.fetch_user(42)
    assert result == {"id": 42, "name": "Alice"}


@pytest.mark.asyncio
async def test_fetch_user_raises_on_404(httpx_mock, client):
    httpx_mock.add_response(
        url="https://api.example.com/users/999",
        method="GET",
        status_code=404,
        text="not found",
    )
    with pytest.raises(APIError) as exc_info:
        await client.fetch_user(999)
    assert exc_info.value.status_code == 404
    assert exc_info.value.body == "not found"


@pytest.mark.asyncio
async def test_fetch_user_network_exception_propagates(httpx_mock, client):
    httpx_mock.add_exception(httpx.ConnectError("boom"))
    with pytest.raises(httpx.TransportError):
        await client.fetch_user(1)


@pytest.mark.asyncio
async def test_create_post_sends_correct_body(httpx_mock, client):
    httpx_mock.add_response(
        url="https://api.example.com/posts",
        method="POST",
        json={"id": 1, "author_id": 7, "title": "hello"},
        status_code=201,
    )
    result = await client.create_post(7, "hello")
    assert result == {"id": 1, "author_id": 7, "title": "hello"}

    requests = httpx_mock.get_requests()
    assert len(requests) == 1
    import json
    assert json.loads(requests[0].content) == {"author_id": 7, "title": "hello"}


@pytest.mark.asyncio
async def test_create_post_raises_on_400(httpx_mock, client):
    httpx_mock.add_response(
        url="https://api.example.com/posts",
        method="POST",
        status_code=400,
        text="bad request",
    )
    with pytest.raises(APIError) as exc_info:
        await client.create_post(1, "")
    assert exc_info.value.status_code == 400


@pytest.mark.asyncio
async def test_ping_returns_true_on_200(httpx_mock, client):
    httpx_mock.add_response(
        url="https://api.example.com/healthz",
        method="GET",
        status_code=200,
    )
    assert await client.ping() is True


@pytest.mark.asyncio
async def test_ping_returns_false_on_non_200(httpx_mock, client):
    httpx_mock.add_response(
        url="https://api.example.com/healthz",
        method="GET",
        status_code=503,
    )
    assert await client.ping() is False


@pytest.mark.asyncio
async def test_ping_returns_false_on_transport_error(httpx_mock, client):
    httpx_mock.add_exception(httpx.ConnectError("no network"))
    assert await client.ping() is False


def test_base_url_strips_trailing_slash():
    c = APIClient("https://api.example.com/")
    assert c.base_url == "https://api.example.com"


def test_api_error_message_format():
    err = APIError(500, "server exploded")
    assert err.status_code == 500
    assert err.body == "server exploded"
    assert "500" in str(err)
    assert "server exploded" in str(err)
